About

Hi, I’m
David.

I design experiences. My work is inspired by timeless design, simplicity for products, and the experience itself. Product marketer and designer through high-intensity graphics, product design, and AI for utility in design.

Manager, LinkedIn Engagement & Agentic AI Pavilion Lead at HumanX — the #1 AI conference in the world. Every product I make carries one standard: people will sense care in what they use every day.

The goal is never decoration. It’s the quiet certainty that something was made specifically for you.

Product DesignBrand Strategy AI · HardwareMarketing Washington, DCSan Francisco, CA
“People will sense care.”

What Moves Me

An Ode to
Apple.

There is a company that taught the world what design could be. Not ornament. Not style. But a kind of moral precision — the insistence that every object a human being touches deserves to be considered deeply.

Apple Park is architecture as philosophy. A ring of glass and steel set inside eleven thousand trees, where the building itself dissolves at the edges. It was Jony Ive's final argument: that beauty and function are not a trade-off. They are the same thing.

That idea lives in everything I make. The quiet certainty that someone thought about you — really thought — before you ever held the thing in your hand. That is the standard I carry.

Jony Ive LoveFrom Apple Park Liquid Glass Precision
“Design is not just what it looks like. Design is how it works.”
Steve Jobs — founder, Apple
175
Acres, Apple Park
2.8M
Sq ft of glass
9,000+
Trees planted
Let’s build something worth caring about
